title: Aqua Laguna Closes In
description: Back in the present, Aqua Laguna bears down on Water Seven while CP9 prepares to leave with Robin and Franky.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Sanji, Chopper. Back in the present, Aqua Laguna bears down on Water Seven while CP9 prepares to leave with Robin and Franky.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: During the 10 years of postpone- went...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So the shipyard is still bankrupt.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We'll do some- thing this time!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The results won't be this fast, iceberg.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: When a man's doing all he can...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: He just thrusts his chest out...!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'd like to have a word...

summary: Back in the present, Aqua Laguna bears down on Water Seven while CP9 prepares to leave with Robin and Franky.
